    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")\n",
    "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
    "pd.set_option(\"display.max_columns\", 200)\n",
    "pd.set_option(\"display.width\", 180)\n",
    "\n",
    "RANDOM_STATE = 42\n",
    "DATA_PATH = Path.home() / \"Downloads\" / \"Proyecto Desarrollo de Soluciones\" / \"KMC-400-20y-libro  45-DatosCompletos.xlsx\"\n",
    "OUTPUT_DIR = Path.home() / \"Downloads\" / \"Proyecto Desarrollo de Soluciones\" / \"modelo2_outputs\"\n",
    "OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "TARGET_COL = \"WASI_FullScale4compositescore\"\n",
    "MAX_MISSING = 0.80\n",
    "MIN_NUMERIC_RATIO = 0.70\n",
    "USE_MICE = False\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "c698bfa7-b224-42f3-8be8-6ec580cf0cc1",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Carga de datos"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "6c46a624-06d1-4f3d-9764-122b1bf7556d",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "raw = pd.read_excel(DATA_PATH, sheet_name=\"Sheet1\", engine=\"openpyxl\")\n",
    "print(\"Forma original:\", raw.shape)\n",
    "raw.head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "7e46f011-d519-4eed-b7f0-2c16d9b6fe52",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Limpieza BASICA de datos\n",
    "Preguntar a Jessica de los datos tratados"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "d389e22d-0930-484c-8a97-bbe5dcaa1007",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "ERROR_TOKENS = [\"#NULL!\", \"#DIV/0!\", \"#VALUE!\", \"#REF!\", \"#NAME?\", \"#N/A\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def clean_excel_tokens(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\n",
    "    out = df.copy()\n",
    "    out = out.replace(ERROR_TOKENS, np.nan)\n",
    "    out = out.replace(r\"^\\s*$\", np.nan, regex=True)\n",
    "    return out\n",
    "\n",
    "data = clean_excel_tokens(raw)\n",
    "print(\"Celdas con #NULL! después de limpiar:\", int((data == \"#NULL!\").sum(numeric_only=False).sum()))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "0a16bc51-62eb-4d7b-9e80-c9e78f0e0837",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Definicion de modulos\n",
    "Se definieron 8 modulos acorde a la propuesta inicial del proyecto en el ciclo pasado"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "24f93346-ddcb-453a-86cf-7dd3a7bac15e",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "MODULE_PREFIXES = {\n",
    "    \"socioeconomico\": [\"SCB_\", \"EDU_\", \"PROF_\", \"ING_\", \"EC_\", \"ICFES_\"],\n",
    "    \"nacimiento\": [\"BIRTH_\", \"PRE_\", \"birth\"],\n",
    "    \"neonatal\": [\"NEO_\", \"HOSP_\", \"VENT_\", \"OXIG\", \"SEPSIS\", \"PEDIATRIC_\", \"AUDIO_\", \"NEURO_\"],\n",
    "    \"seguimiento_0_12m\": [\"FOLL12M_\", \"NUT12M_\", \"FOLLOW_\", \"EX41_\", \"HOME12_\"],\n",
    "    \"desarrollo_psicomotor\": [\"PMD_\", \"DQ_\", \"NEUROSENS_\", \"APEGO_\", \"CONNERS_\"],\n",
    "    \"home_12m\": [\"HOMET_\", \"HOME_\", \"DOMICILIARYVIST_\", \"STRANGESITUATION_\"],\n",
    "    \"outcome_20a\": [\"WASI_\", \"TAP_\", \"CVLT_\", \"VMI_\", \"METP_\", \"ABCLP_\", \"ABCLBF_\", \"ASR_\", \"RT_\", \"NHPT_\", \"SURV24_\", \"SURVEY24YEARS_\", \"Years15_\", \"Kidscreen\", \"CONNERS_\"],\n",
    "    \"neuroimagen\": [\"ASEG_\", \"aseg_\", \"Aseg_\", \"TRAC_\", \"APARC_\", \"BROADMAN_\", \"GMPARC_\", \"CAM_\", \"ROI_\"],\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "ID_COLS = {\"code\", \"BirthDate\", \"Exam15years\", \"filter_$\", \"socialcharacteristicsatbirth\"}\n",
    "\n",
    "LEAK_PREFIXES = [\"WASI_\", \"TAP_\", \"CVLT_\", \"VMI_\", \"METP_\", \"ABCLP_\", \"ABCLBF_\", \"ASR_\", \"RT_\", \"NHPT_\", \"SURV24_\", \"SURVEY24YEARS_\", \"Years15_\", \"Kidscreen\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def starts_with_any(col: str, prefixes: list[str]) -> bool:\n",
    "    return any(str(col).startswith(p) for p in prefixes)\n",
    "\n",
    "def columns_for_module(df: pd.DataFrame, module_name: str) -> list[str]:\n",
    "    prefixes = MODULE_PREFIXES[module_name]\n",
    "    return [c for c in df.columns if starts_with_any(c, prefixes)]\n",
    "\n",
    "module_cols = {m: columns_for_module(data, m) for m in MODULE_PREFIXES}\n",
    "for m, cols in module_cols.items():\n",
    "    print(f\"{m:>22}: {len(cols):4d} columnas\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "d2525bf8-63e0-404f-9042-b28c50f84038",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Missingness"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "751a026a-19bf-4742-9afc-dc94ded27a6a",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def summarize_missingness(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str]) -> pd.Series:\n",
    "    if not cols:\n",
    "        return pd.Series(dtype=float)\n",
    "    return df[cols].isna().mean().sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "missing_summary = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "    m: summarize_missingness(data, cols).mean() if cols else np.nan\n",
    "    for m, cols in module_cols.items()\n",
    "}, index=[\"missing_promedio\"]).T.sort_values(\"missing_promedio\", ascending=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "missing_summary"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "00bbfc0a-d126-4142-9a37-1b1c1406aef4",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Cohorte de analisis (nacimiento prevarturo -> Target)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "2b556a47-b5ee-4576-b2ea-889dea47fb0f",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "analysis_df = data.loc[data[\"preterm\"].eq(1)].copy()\n",
    "analysis_df[TARGET_COL] = pd.to_numeric(analysis_df[TARGET_COL], errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "analysis_df = analysis_df.loc[analysis_df[TARGET_COL].notna()].copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Cohorte prematuros con target observado:\", analysis_df.shape)\n",
    "display(analysis_df[[\"preterm\", \"ubicac\", \"lessthan1801g\", TARGET_COL]].head())\n",
    "print(\"\\nDistribución de 'ubicac' dentro de la cohorte:\")\n",
    "print(analysis_df[\"ubicac\"].value_counts(dropna=False))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "9237ef1d-f168-485f-93ad-4f1ca98ae3ff",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Seleccion de predictores"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "4057256e-dc59-41be-8173-abcb46589272",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "CLINICAL_MODULES = [\"socioeconomico\", \"nacimiento\", \"neonatal\", \"seguimiento_0_12m\", \"desarrollo_psicomotor\", \"home_12m\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_feature_lists(df: pd.DataFrame):\n",
    "    clinical_cols = []\n",
    "    neuro_cols = []\n",
    "    for col in df.columns:\n",
    "        if col == TARGET_COL or col in ID_COLS:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        if starts_with_any(col, LEAK_PREFIXES):\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        if starts_with_any(col, MODULE_PREFIXES[\"neuroimagen\"]):\n",
    "            neuro_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        elif any(starts_with_any(col, MODULE_PREFIXES[m]) for m in CLINICAL_MODULES):\n",
    "            clinical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        elif col in {\"ubicac\", \"lessthan1801g\", \"preterm\"}:\n",
    "            clinical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "    return clinical_cols, neuro_cols\n",
    "\n",
    "clinical_cols_raw, neuro_cols_raw = build_feature_lists(analysis_df)\n",
    "print(\"Predictores clínicos brutos:\", len(clinical_cols_raw))\n",
    "print(\"Predictores neuroimagen brutos:\", len(neuro_cols_raw))\n",
    "\n",
    "def drop_high_missing(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str], max_missing: float = MAX_MISSING) -> list[str]:\n",
    "    if not cols:\n",
    "        return []\n",
    "    miss = df[cols].isna().mean()\n",
    "    return [c for c in cols if miss[c] <= max_missing]\n",
    "\n",
    "clinical_cols = drop_high_missing(analysis_df, clinical_cols_raw, MAX_MISSING)\n",
    "neuro_cols = drop_high_missing(analysis_df, neuro_cols_raw, MAX_MISSING)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Predictores clínicos tras filtro de missing:\", len(clinical_cols))\n",
    "print(\"Predictores neuroimagen tras filtro de missing:\", len(neuro_cols))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "83dfeab9-98f2-40bb-b80d-b3b4a95759cf",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Inferencia\n",
    "Inferir tipos y columnas que no son relevantes"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "b292953d-d9b0-4f97-8dd6-5160119d3736",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def normalize_feature_types(df_features: pd.DataFrame, min_numeric_ratio: float = MIN_NUMERIC_RATIO, cat_max_unique: int = 20):\n",
    "    X = df_features.copy()\n",
    "    numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols = [], [], []\n",
    "\n",
    "    for col in list(X.columns):\n",
    "        s = X[col]\n",
    "\n",
    "        if pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(s):\n",
    "            numeric_cols.append(col)\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        numeric_candidate = pd.to_numeric(s, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "        ratio_numeric = numeric_candidate.notna().mean()\n",
    "\n",
    "        if ratio_numeric >= min_numeric_ratio:\n",
    "            X[col] = numeric_candidate\n",
    "            numeric_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            nunique = s.nunique(dropna=True)\n",
    "            if 2 <= nunique <= cat_max_unique:\n",
    "                X[col] = s.astype(\"string\")\n",
    "                categorical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                dropped_cols.append(col)\n",
    "\n",
    "    constant_cols = [c for c in X.columns if X[c].nunique(dropna=True) <= 1]\n",
    "    if constant_cols:\n",
    "        X = X.drop(columns=constant_cols)\n",
    "        numeric_cols = [c for c in numeric_cols if c not in constant_cols]\n",
    "        categorical_cols = [c for c in categorical_cols if c not in constant_cols]\n",
    "        dropped_cols.extend(constant_cols)\n",
    "\n",
    "    return X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, sorted(set(dropped_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "def make_design_matrix(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str]):\n",
    "    X = df[cols].copy()\n",
    "    X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols = normalize_feature_types(X)\n",
    "    return X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols\n",
    "\n",
    "X_clinical, num_clinical, cat_clinical, dropped_clinical = make_design_matrix(analysis_df, clinical_cols)\n",
    "X_multimodal_raw = analysis_df[clinical_cols + neuro_cols].copy()\n",
    "X_multimodal, num_multi, cat_multi, dropped_multi = normalize_feature_types(X_multimodal_raw)\n",
    "\n",
    "y = analysis_df[TARGET_COL].astype(float)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Forma clínica:\", X_clinical.shape, \"| numéricas:\", len(num_clinical), \"| categóricas:\", len(cat_clinical))\n",
    "print(\"Forma multimodal:\", X_multimodal.shape, \"| numéricas:\", len(num_multi), \"| categóricas:\", len(cat_multi))\n",
    "print(\"Columnas descartadas en clínica:\", len(dropped_clinical))\n",
    "print(\"Columnas descartadas en multimodal:\", len(dropped_multi))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "03e4e050-f026-47db-9896-1bb4fb26b0d6",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Submuestra"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "4926c741-0d82-4000-8c5d-19c935ccb2be",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "neuro_available_mask = analysis_df[neuro_cols].notna().any(axis=1)\n",
    "X_clinical_sub = X_clinical.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "X_multimodal_sub = X_multimodal.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "y_sub = y.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Cohorte clínica para comparación:\", X_clinical.shape[0], \"filas\")\n",
    "print(\"Submuestra con neuroimagen disponible:\", X_clinical_sub.shape[0], \"filas\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "ac3fd5e5-a88c-4946-babb-0c4bc14e5e55",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Pipeline con el modelo"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "4ac0df11-94af-41b3-bf10-cc7891e4297c",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def sanitize_frame(X):\n",
    "    return pd.DataFrame(X).replace({pd.NA: np.nan, None: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def to_numeric_df(X):\n",
    "    X = sanitize_frame(X)\n",
    "    return X.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def to_object_df(X):\n",
    "    X = sanitize_frame(X)\n",
    "    return X.astype(str).replace(\"nan\", np.nan)\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_preprocessor(numeric_cols, categorical_cols):\n",
    "\n",
    "    numeric_pipeline = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"to_numeric\", FunctionTransformer(\n",
    "            to_numeric_df,\n",
    "            feature_names_out=\"one-to-one\"\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "        (\"imputer\", SimpleImputer(strategy=\"median\")),\n",
    "        (\"scaler\", StandardScaler()),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    categorical_pipeline = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"to_object\", FunctionTransformer(\n",
    "            to_object_df,\n",
    "            feature_names_out=\"one-to-one\"\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "        (\"imputer\", SimpleImputer(strategy=\"most_frequent\")),\n",
    "        (\"onehot\", OneHotEncoder(\n",
    "            handle_unknown=\"ignore\",\n",
    "            sparse_output=False\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    transformers = []\n",
    "\n",
    "    if numeric_cols:\n",
    "        transformers.append((\"num\", numeric_pipeline, numeric_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "    if categorical_cols:\n",
    "        transformers.append((\"cat\", categorical_pipeline, categorical_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "    return ColumnTransformer(\n",
    "        transformers=transformers,\n",
    "        remainder=\"drop\",\n",
    "        verbose_feature_names_out=True\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_model():\n",
    "    return XGBRegressor(\n",
    "        objective=\"reg:squarederror\",\n",
    "        n_estimators=250,\n",
    "        learning_rate=0.05,\n",
    "        max_depth=3,\n",
    "        subsample=0.8,\n",
    "        colsample_bytree=0.8,\n",
    "        reg_lambda=1.0,\n",
    "        random_state=RANDOM_STATE,\n",
    "        n_jobs=-1,\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X: pd.DataFrame,\n",
    "    y: pd.Series,\n",
    "    numeric_cols,\n",
    "    categorical_cols,\n",
    "    label: str = \"modelo\"\n",
    "):\n",
    "    preprocessor = build_preprocessor(numeric_cols, categorical_cols)\n",
    "    model = build_model()\n",
    "\n",
    "    pipe = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"preprocess\", preprocessor),\n",
    "        (\"model\", model),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    cv = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=RANDOM_STATE)\n",
    "    oof_pred = cross_val_predict(pipe, X, y, cv=cv, n_jobs=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "    metrics = {\n",
    "        \"modelo\": label,\n",
    "        \"n_filas\": int(X.shape[0]),\n",
    "        \"n_variables\": int(X.shape[1]),\n",
    "        \"MAE\": float(mean_absolute_error(y, oof_pred)),\n",
    "        \"RMSE\": float(mean_squared_error(y, oof_pred) ** 0.5),\n",
    "        \"R2\": float(r2_score(y, oof_pred)),\n",
    "    }\n",
    "\n",
    "    pipe.fit(X, y)\n",
    "\n",
    "    return pipe, pd.Series(oof_pred, index=y.index), metrics\n",
    "\n",
    "X_clinical = X_clinical.replace({pd.NA: np.nan})\n",
    "X_multimodal_sub = X_multimodal_sub.replace({pd.NA: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "y = pd.to_numeric(y, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "y_sub = pd.to_numeric(y_sub, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "pipe_clinical, pred_clinical, metrics_clinical = evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X_clinical.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    y.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    num_clinical,\n",
    "    cat_clinical,\n",
    "    label=\"clínico\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "pipe_multi, pred_multi, metrics_multi = evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X_multimodal_sub.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    y_sub.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    num_multi,\n",
    "    cat_multi,\n",
    "    label=\"multimodal\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "results = pd.DataFrame([metrics_clinical, metrics_multi])\n",
    "results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "2fe729d9-4753-4c3f-9d88-056dc4960f04",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))\n",
    "metric_names = [\"MAE\", \"RMSE\", \"R2\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "for ax, metric in zip(axes, metric_names):\n",
    "    sns.barplot(data=results, x=\"modelo\", y=metric, ax=ax)\n",
    "    ax.set_title(metric)\n",
    "    ax.set_xlabel(\"\")\n",
    "    ax.set_ylabel(metric)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "1a4ca9ab-dbbe-4e35-bddb-580482ee4509",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "best_row = results.sort_values(\"R2\", ascending=False).iloc[0]\n",
    "best_label = best_row[\"modelo\"]\n",
    "best_pipe = pipe_multi if best_label == \"multimodal\" else pipe_clinical\n",
    "best_X = X_multimodal_sub.reset_index(drop=True) if best_label == \"multimodal\" else X_clinical.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "preprocess = best_pipe.named_steps[\"preprocess\"]\n",
    "model = best_pipe.named_steps[\"model\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "X_trans = preprocess.transform(best_X)\n",
    "feature_names = preprocess.get_feature_names_out()\n",
    "\n",
    "sample_size = min(120, X_trans.shape[0])\n",
    "sample_idx = np.random.RandomState(RANDOM_STATE).choice(X_trans.shape[0], size=sample_size, replace=False)\n",
    "X_shap = X_trans[sample_idx]\n",
    "\n",
    "explainer = shap.TreeExplainer(model)\n",
    "shap_values = explainer.shap_values(X_shap)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "shap.summary_plot(shap_values, X_shap, feature_names=feature_names, show=False, max_display=20)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "57492d86-b289-411e-aca6-41712ef8167c",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "best_row = results.sort_values(\"R2\", ascending=False).iloc[0]\n",
    "best_label = best_row[\"modelo\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "if best_label == \"multimodal\":\n",
    "    best_pipe = pipe_multi\n",
    "    best_num = num_multi\n",
    "    best_cat = cat_multi\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    best_pipe = pipe_clinical\n",
    "    best_num = num_clinical\n",
    "    best_cat = cat_clinical\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# guardar\n",
    "joblib.dump(pipe_clinical, OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_clinico_v1.joblib\")\n",
    "joblib.dump(pipe_multi, OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_multimodal_v1.joblib\")\n",
    "\n",
    "joblib.dump(\n",
    "    {\n",
    "        \"model\": best_pipe,\n",
    "        \"numeric_cols\": best_num,\n",
    "        \"categorical_cols\": best_cat,\n",
    "        \"metrics\": results,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_best_bundle.joblib\"\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "0b1a128e-3527-4e7e-be0e-2b85ad33bfaf",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# =========================================================\n",
    "# EJEMPLO DE USO INFERENCIA\n",
    "# =========================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "def predict_new_data(df, bundle_path, y_true=None):\n",
    "\n",
    "    bundle = joblib.load(bundle_path)\n",
    "    pipe = bundle[\"model\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "    df_clean = df.replace({pd.NA: np.nan, None: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "    preds = pipe.predict(df_clean)\n",
    "\n",
    "    results = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "        \"prediccion_modelo\": preds\n",
    "    }, index=df.index)\n",
    "\n",
    "    if y_true is not None:\n",
    "        results[\"valor_real\"] = y_true\n",
    "        results[\"error\"] = results[\"prediccion_modelo\"] - results[\"valor_real\"]\n",
    "        results[\"abs_error\"] = results[\"error\"].abs()\n",
    "\n",
    "    return results\n",
    "\n",
    "bundle = OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_best_bundle.joblib\"\n",
    "\n",
    "preds = predict_new_data(\n",
    "    X_clinical.iloc[:5],\n",
    "    bundle,\n",
    "    y.iloc[:5]\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "preds"
   ]
  }
 ],

   "source": [
    "## Cargar Librerias y Path de datos"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "6be8b929-836a-4652-9228-325e4974ddb9",

   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Librerias\n",
    "import os\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import joblib\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "\n",
    "from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer\n",
    "from sklearn.experimental import enable_iterative_imputer \n",
    "from sklearn.feature_selection import VarianceThreshold\n",
    "from sklearn.impute import IterativeImputer, SimpleImputer\n",
    "from sklearn.linear_model import BayesianRidge\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import KFold, cross_val_predict\n",
    "from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline\n",
    "from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder, StandardScaler, FunctionTransformer\n",
    "\n",
    "from xgboost import XGBRegressor\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "import shap\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")\n",
    "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
    "pd.set_option(\"display.max_columns\", 200)\n",
    "pd.set_option(\"display.width\", 180)\n",
    "\n",
    "RANDOM_STATE = 42\n",
    "DATA_PATH = Path.home() / \"Downloads\" / \"Proyecto Desarrollo de Soluciones\" / \"KMC-400-20y-libro  45-DatosCompletos.xlsx\"\n",
    "OUTPUT_DIR = Path.home() / \"Downloads\" / \"Proyecto Desarrollo de Soluciones\" / \"modelo2_outputs\"\n",
    "OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "TARGET_COL = \"WASI_FullScale4compositescore\"\n",
    "MAX_MISSING = 0.80\n",
    "MIN_NUMERIC_RATIO = 0.70\n",
    "USE_MICE = False\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "1519c55f-2c10-439d-b03e-f10a9096cb6b",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Carga de datos"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "855130b1-c913-4cb0-8230-c42e0868dd14",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "raw = pd.read_excel(DATA_PATH, sheet_name=\"Sheet1\", engine=\"openpyxl\")\n",
    "print(\"Forma original:\", raw.shape)\n",
    "raw.head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "b79a30c3-cc01-4d9a-ab87-4caecc3a8e42",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Limpieza BASICA de datos\n",
    "Preguntar a Jessica de los datos tratados"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "5e59b0bf-36b3-4d2e-b3ad-69fc86b46121",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "ERROR_TOKENS = [\"#NULL!\", \"#DIV/0!\", \"#VALUE!\", \"#REF!\", \"#NAME?\", \"#N/A\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def clean_excel_tokens(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\n",
    "    out = df.copy()\n",
    "    out = out.replace(ERROR_TOKENS, np.nan)\n",
    "    out = out.replace(r\"^\\s*$\", np.nan, regex=True)\n",
    "    return out\n",
    "\n",
    "data = clean_excel_tokens(raw)\n",
    "print(\"Celdas con #NULL! después de limpiar:\", int((data == \"#NULL!\").sum(numeric_only=False).sum()))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "2beb948d-f02b-4e7f-9b6d-d7a6ac52b4f5",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Definicion de modulos\n",
    "Se definieron 8 modulos acorde a la propuesta inicial del proyecto en el ciclo pasado"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "7883f1e5-c0cb-48cc-8977-0ff444442731",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "MODULE_PREFIXES = {\n",
    "    \"socioeconomico\": [\"SCB_\", \"EDU_\", \"PROF_\", \"ING_\", \"EC_\", \"ICFES_\"],\n",
    "    \"nacimiento\": [\"BIRTH_\", \"PRE_\", \"birth\"],\n",
    "    \"neonatal\": [\"NEO_\", \"HOSP_\", \"VENT_\", \"OXIG\", \"SEPSIS\", \"PEDIATRIC_\", \"AUDIO_\", \"NEURO_\"],\n",
    "    \"seguimiento_0_12m\": [\"FOLL12M_\", \"NUT12M_\", \"FOLLOW_\", \"EX41_\", \"HOME12_\"],\n",
    "    \"desarrollo_psicomotor\": [\"PMD_\", \"DQ_\", \"NEUROSENS_\", \"APEGO_\", \"CONNERS_\"],\n",
    "    \"home_12m\": [\"HOMET_\", \"HOME_\", \"DOMICILIARYVIST_\", \"STRANGESITUATION_\"],\n",
    "    \"outcome_20a\": [\"WASI_\", \"TAP_\", \"CVLT_\", \"VMI_\", \"METP_\", \"ABCLP_\", \"ABCLBF_\", \"ASR_\", \"RT_\", \"NHPT_\", \"SURV24_\", \"SURVEY24YEARS_\", \"Years15_\", \"Kidscreen\", \"CONNERS_\"],\n",
    "    \"neuroimagen\": [\"ASEG_\", \"aseg_\", \"Aseg_\", \"TRAC_\", \"APARC_\", \"BROADMAN_\", \"GMPARC_\", \"CAM_\", \"ROI_\"],\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "ID_COLS = {\"code\", \"BirthDate\", \"Exam15years\", \"filter_$\", \"socialcharacteristicsatbirth\"}\n",
    "\n",
    "LEAK_PREFIXES = [\"WASI_\", \"TAP_\", \"CVLT_\", \"VMI_\", \"METP_\", \"ABCLP_\", \"ABCLBF_\", \"ASR_\", \"RT_\", \"NHPT_\", \"SURV24_\", \"SURVEY24YEARS_\", \"Years15_\", \"Kidscreen\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def starts_with_any(col: str, prefixes: list[str]) -> bool:\n",
    "    return any(str(col).startswith(p) for p in prefixes)\n",
    "\n",
    "def columns_for_module(df: pd.DataFrame, module_name: str) -> list[str]:\n",
    "    prefixes = MODULE_PREFIXES[module_name]\n",
    "    return [c for c in df.columns if starts_with_any(c, prefixes)]\n",
    "\n",
    "module_cols = {m: columns_for_module(data, m) for m in MODULE_PREFIXES}\n",
    "for m, cols in module_cols.items():\n",
    "    print(f\"{m:>22}: {len(cols):4d} columnas\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "8a888188-6fc9-4d6e-b4f2-36c9e6c8b389",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Missingness"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "bbf3d09e-9b2c-490f-9422-aa8b104c8e12",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def summarize_missingness(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str]) -> pd.Series:\n",
    "    if not cols:\n",
    "        return pd.Series(dtype=float)\n",
    "    return df[cols].isna().mean().sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "missing_summary = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "    m: summarize_missingness(data, cols).mean() if cols else np.nan\n",
    "    for m, cols in module_cols.items()\n",
    "}, index=[\"missing_promedio\"]).T.sort_values(\"missing_promedio\", ascending=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "missing_summary"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "7a3492b7-d975-49f7-908c-6d01eb48b0ab",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Cohorte de analisis (nacimiento prevarturo -> Target)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "a6bf23a2-2b30-4900-bee0-f4d0ab667752",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "analysis_df = data.loc[data[\"preterm\"].eq(1)].copy()\n",
    "analysis_df[TARGET_COL] = pd.to_numeric(analysis_df[TARGET_COL], errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "analysis_df = analysis_df.loc[analysis_df[TARGET_COL].notna()].copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Cohorte prematuros con target observado:\", analysis_df.shape)\n",
    "display(analysis_df[[\"preterm\", \"ubicac\", \"lessthan1801g\", TARGET_COL]].head())\n",
    "print(\"\\nDistribución de 'ubicac' dentro de la cohorte:\")\n",
    "print(analysis_df[\"ubicac\"].value_counts(dropna=False))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "59b3c130-d5d2-4dfa-add3-e439d369189c",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Seleccion de predictores"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "0f82d65e-0383-4aa2-a717-042e058267b6",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "CLINICAL_MODULES = [\"socioeconomico\", \"nacimiento\", \"neonatal\", \"seguimiento_0_12m\", \"desarrollo_psicomotor\", \"home_12m\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_feature_lists(df: pd.DataFrame):\n",
    "    clinical_cols = []\n",
    "    neuro_cols = []\n",
    "    for col in df.columns:\n",
    "        if col == TARGET_COL or col in ID_COLS:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        if starts_with_any(col, LEAK_PREFIXES):\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        if starts_with_any(col, MODULE_PREFIXES[\"neuroimagen\"]):\n",
    "            neuro_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        elif any(starts_with_any(col, MODULE_PREFIXES[m]) for m in CLINICAL_MODULES):\n",
    "            clinical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        elif col in {\"ubicac\", \"lessthan1801g\", \"preterm\"}:\n",
    "            clinical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "    return clinical_cols, neuro_cols\n",
    "\n",
    "clinical_cols_raw, neuro_cols_raw = build_feature_lists(analysis_df)\n",
    "print(\"Predictores clínicos brutos:\", len(clinical_cols_raw))\n",
    "print(\"Predictores neuroimagen brutos:\", len(neuro_cols_raw))\n",
    "\n",
    "def drop_high_missing(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str], max_missing: float = MAX_MISSING) -> list[str]:\n",
    "    if not cols:\n",
    "        return []\n",
    "    miss = df[cols].isna().mean()\n",
    "    return [c for c in cols if miss[c] <= max_missing]\n",
    "\n",
    "clinical_cols = drop_high_missing(analysis_df, clinical_cols_raw, MAX_MISSING)\n",
    "neuro_cols = drop_high_missing(analysis_df, neuro_cols_raw, MAX_MISSING)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Predictores clínicos tras filtro de missing:\", len(clinical_cols))\n",
    "print(\"Predictores neuroimagen tras filtro de missing:\", len(neuro_cols))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "d05d291f-44c7-4e94-b3a9-68c7b14dbe1d",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Inferencia\n",
    "Inferir tipos y columnas que no son relevantes"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "6fbc25db-ceff-4869-be57-ba01af91bce4",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def normalize_feature_types(df_features: pd.DataFrame, min_numeric_ratio: float = MIN_NUMERIC_RATIO, cat_max_unique: int = 20):\n",
    "    X = df_features.copy()\n",
    "    numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols = [], [], []\n",
    "\n",
    "    for col in list(X.columns):\n",
    "        s = X[col]\n",
    "\n",
    "        if pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(s):\n",
    "            numeric_cols.append(col)\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        numeric_candidate = pd.to_numeric(s, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "        ratio_numeric = numeric_candidate.notna().mean()\n",
    "\n",
    "        if ratio_numeric >= min_numeric_ratio:\n",
    "            X[col] = numeric_candidate\n",
    "            numeric_cols.append(col)\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            nunique = s.nunique(dropna=True)\n",
    "            if 2 <= nunique <= cat_max_unique:\n",
    "                X[col] = s.astype(\"string\")\n",
    "                categorical_cols.append(col)\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                dropped_cols.append(col)\n",
    "\n",
    "    constant_cols = [c for c in X.columns if X[c].nunique(dropna=True) <= 1]\n",
    "    if constant_cols:\n",
    "        X = X.drop(columns=constant_cols)\n",
    "        numeric_cols = [c for c in numeric_cols if c not in constant_cols]\n",
    "        categorical_cols = [c for c in categorical_cols if c not in constant_cols]\n",
    "        dropped_cols.extend(constant_cols)\n",
    "\n",
    "    return X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, sorted(set(dropped_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "def make_design_matrix(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str]):\n",
    "    X = df[cols].copy()\n",
    "    X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols = normalize_feature_types(X)\n",
    "    return X, numeric_cols, categorical_cols, dropped_cols\n",
    "\n",
    "X_clinical, num_clinical, cat_clinical, dropped_clinical = make_design_matrix(analysis_df, clinical_cols)\n",
    "X_multimodal_raw = analysis_df[clinical_cols + neuro_cols].copy()\n",
    "X_multimodal, num_multi, cat_multi, dropped_multi = normalize_feature_types(X_multimodal_raw)\n",
    "\n",
    "y = analysis_df[TARGET_COL].astype(float)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Forma clínica:\", X_clinical.shape, \"| numéricas:\", len(num_clinical), \"| categóricas:\", len(cat_clinical))\n",
    "print(\"Forma multimodal:\", X_multimodal.shape, \"| numéricas:\", len(num_multi), \"| categóricas:\", len(cat_multi))\n",
    "print(\"Columnas descartadas en clínica:\", len(dropped_clinical))\n",
    "print(\"Columnas descartadas en multimodal:\", len(dropped_multi))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "5f84934f-ba5c-42ba-aafe-c5c0d97fba77",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Submuestra"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "7f6f860d-54f0-463c-89ad-6a5c006d67e1",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "neuro_available_mask = analysis_df[neuro_cols].notna().any(axis=1)\n",
    "X_clinical_sub = X_clinical.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "X_multimodal_sub = X_multimodal.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "y_sub = y.loc[neuro_available_mask].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Cohorte clínica para comparación:\", X_clinical.shape[0], \"filas\")\n",
    "print(\"Submuestra con neuroimagen disponible:\", X_clinical_sub.shape[0], \"filas\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "8f7f1a47-a1c3-4934-b6b5-7c30ad86f38b",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "## Pipeline con el modelo"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "654506a4-cb31-4a46-9213-f1ce96801f42",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def sanitize_frame(X):\n",
    "    return pd.DataFrame(X).replace({pd.NA: np.nan, None: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def to_numeric_df(X):\n",
    "    X = sanitize_frame(X)\n",
    "    return X.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def to_object_df(X):\n",
    "    X = sanitize_frame(X)\n",
    "    return X.astype(str).replace(\"nan\", np.nan)\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_preprocessor(numeric_cols, categorical_cols):\n",
    "\n",
    "    numeric_pipeline = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"to_numeric\", FunctionTransformer(\n",
    "            to_numeric_df,\n",
    "            feature_names_out=\"one-to-one\"\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "        (\"imputer\", SimpleImputer(strategy=\"median\")),\n",
    "        (\"scaler\", StandardScaler()),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    categorical_pipeline = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"to_object\", FunctionTransformer(\n",
    "            to_object_df,\n",
    "            feature_names_out=\"one-to-one\"\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "        (\"imputer\", SimpleImputer(strategy=\"most_frequent\")),\n",
    "        (\"onehot\", OneHotEncoder(\n",
    "            handle_unknown=\"ignore\",\n",
    "            sparse_output=False\n",
    "        )),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    transformers = []\n",
    "\n",
    "    if numeric_cols:\n",
    "        transformers.append((\"num\", numeric_pipeline, numeric_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "    if categorical_cols:\n",
    "        transformers.append((\"cat\", categorical_pipeline, categorical_cols))\n",
    "\n",
    "    return ColumnTransformer(\n",
    "        transformers=transformers,\n",
    "        remainder=\"drop\",\n",
    "        verbose_feature_names_out=True\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_model():\n",
    "    return XGBRegressor(\n",
    "        objective=\"reg:squarederror\",\n",
    "        n_estimators=250,\n",
    "        learning_rate=0.05,\n",
    "        max_depth=3,\n",
    "        subsample=0.8,\n",
    "        colsample_bytree=0.8,\n",
    "        reg_lambda=1.0,\n",
    "        random_state=RANDOM_STATE,\n",
    "        n_jobs=-1,\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X: pd.DataFrame,\n",
    "    y: pd.Series,\n",
    "    numeric_cols,\n",
    "    categorical_cols,\n",
    "    label: str = \"modelo\"\n",
    "):\n",
    "    preprocessor = build_preprocessor(numeric_cols, categorical_cols)\n",
    "    model = build_model()\n",
    "\n",
    "    pipe = Pipeline([\n",
    "        (\"preprocess\", preprocessor),\n",
    "        (\"model\", model),\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    cv = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=RANDOM_STATE)\n",
    "    oof_pred = cross_val_predict(pipe, X, y, cv=cv, n_jobs=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "    metrics = {\n",
    "        \"modelo\": label,\n",
    "        \"n_filas\": int(X.shape[0]),\n",
    "        \"n_variables\": int(X.shape[1]),\n",
    "        \"MAE\": float(mean_absolute_error(y, oof_pred)),\n",
    "        \"RMSE\": float(mean_squared_error(y, oof_pred) ** 0.5),\n",
    "        \"R2\": float(r2_score(y, oof_pred)),\n",
    "    }\n",
    "\n",
    "    pipe.fit(X, y)\n",
    "\n",
    "    return pipe, pd.Series(oof_pred, index=y.index), metrics\n",
    "\n",
    "X_clinical = X_clinical.replace({pd.NA: np.nan})\n",
    "X_multimodal_sub = X_multimodal_sub.replace({pd.NA: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "y = pd.to_numeric(y, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "y_sub = pd.to_numeric(y_sub, errors=\"coerce\")\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "pipe_clinical, pred_clinical, metrics_clinical = evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X_clinical.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    y.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    num_clinical,\n",
    "    cat_clinical,\n",
    "    label=\"clínico\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "pipe_multi, pred_multi, metrics_multi = evaluate_dataset(\n",
    "    X_multimodal_sub.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    y_sub.reset_index(drop=True),\n",
    "    num_multi,\n",
    "    cat_multi,\n",
    "    label=\"multimodal\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "results = pd.DataFrame([metrics_clinical, metrics_multi])\n",
    "results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "bc28cf2a-6608-4fbd-96cb-6d3f696fedd4",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))\n",
    "metric_names = [\"MAE\", \"RMSE\", \"R2\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "for ax, metric in zip(axes, metric_names):\n",
    "    sns.barplot(data=results, x=\"modelo\", y=metric, ax=ax)\n",
    "    ax.set_title(metric)\n",
    "    ax.set_xlabel(\"\")\n",
    "    ax.set_ylabel(metric)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "fe14f96b-5fa3-4f94-9a5b-09e8afed5ef0",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "best_row = results.sort_values(\"R2\", ascending=False).iloc[0]\n",
    "best_label = best_row[\"modelo\"]\n",
    "best_pipe = pipe_multi if best_label == \"multimodal\" else pipe_clinical\n",
    "best_X = X_multimodal_sub.reset_index(drop=True) if best_label == \"multimodal\" else X_clinical.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "preprocess = best_pipe.named_steps[\"preprocess\"]\n",
    "model = best_pipe.named_steps[\"model\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "X_trans = preprocess.transform(best_X)\n",
    "feature_names = preprocess.get_feature_names_out()\n",
    "\n",
    "sample_size = min(120, X_trans.shape[0])\n",
    "sample_idx = np.random.RandomState(RANDOM_STATE).choice(X_trans.shape[0], size=sample_size, replace=False)\n",
    "X_shap = X_trans[sample_idx]\n",
    "\n",
    "explainer = shap.TreeExplainer(model)\n",
    "shap_values = explainer.shap_values(X_shap)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "shap.summary_plot(shap_values, X_shap, feature_names=feature_names, show=False, max_display=20)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "3328ee0d-04e3-42e8-8533-9254fe28c4d4",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "best_row = results.sort_values(\"R2\", ascending=False).iloc[0]\n",
    "best_label = best_row[\"modelo\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "if best_label == \"multimodal\":\n",
    "    best_pipe = pipe_multi\n",
    "    best_num = num_multi\n",
    "    best_cat = cat_multi\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    best_pipe = pipe_clinical\n",
    "    best_num = num_clinical\n",
    "    best_cat = cat_clinical\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# guardar\n",
    "joblib.dump(pipe_clinical, OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_clinico_v1.joblib\")\n",
    "joblib.dump(pipe_multi, OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_multimodal_v1.joblib\")\n",
    "\n",
    "joblib.dump(\n",
    "    {\n",
    "        \"model\": best_pipe,\n",
    "        \"numeric_cols\": best_num,\n",
    "        \"categorical_cols\": best_cat,\n",
    "        \"metrics\": results,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_best_bundle.joblib\"\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 0,
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "2edc8a79-86b5-4ba1-b386-d7bb4dcc6aac",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# =========================================================\n",
    "# EJEMPLO DE USO INFERENCIA\n",
    "# =========================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "def predict_new_data(df, bundle_path, y_true=None):\n",
    "\n",
    "    bundle = joblib.load(bundle_path)\n",
    "    pipe = bundle[\"model\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "    df_clean = df.replace({pd.NA: np.nan, None: np.nan})\n",
    "\n",
    "    preds = pipe.predict(df_clean)\n",
    "\n",
    "    results = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "        \"prediccion_modelo\": preds\n",
    "    }, index=df.index)\n",
    "\n",
    "    if y_true is not None:\n",
    "        results[\"valor_real\"] = y_true\n",
    "        results[\"error\"] = results[\"prediccion_modelo\"] - results[\"valor_real\"]\n",
    "        results[\"abs_error\"] = results[\"error\"].abs()\n",
    "\n",
    "    return results\n",
    "\n",
    "bundle = OUTPUT_DIR / \"modelo2_best_bundle.joblib\"\n",
    "\n",
    "preds = predict_new_data(\n",
    "    X_clinical.iloc[:5],\n",
    "    bundle,\n",
    "    y.iloc[:5]\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "preds"
   ]
  }
 ],

## notebooks/predictive-models/Modelo Predictivo WASI.ipynb

```text
{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "application/vnd.databricks.v1+cell": {
     "cellMetadata": {},
     "inputWidgets": {},
     "nuid": "1a764743-f832-4b10-8f78-e68ff0c7d029",
     "showTitle": false,
     "tableResultSettingsMap": {},
     "title": ""
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "# Saving Brains — KMC-400-20y\n",
    "## M8: WASI K=3 Predictive Model — Three-Class Cognitive Phenotype\n",
    "### Phase 1 (Birth → 3 months CA) · Phase 2 (Birth → 12 months CA)\n",
    "\n",
    "**Target:** WASI clustering with K=3 — mathematically optimal for WASI FSIQ distribution  \n",
    "**Classes:** GO-1 High IQ · GO-2 Medium IQ · GO-3 Low IQ (risk)  \n",
    "**Task:** Multiclass classification (softmax) + binary risk flag (GO-3 vs rest)  \n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "### Key changes from M7 (binary GO-i K=2)\n",
    "\n",
    "| Aspect | M7 — Binary | M8 — WASI K=3 |\n",
    "|--------|-------------|----------------|\n",
    "| Cluster source | `clusters_GOi.csv` | `clusters_GO_WASI_v1.csv` |\n",
    "| Classes | GO-1 High / GO-2 Low | GO-1 High / GO-2 Medium / GO-3 Low |\n",
    "| Target column | `GO_i` (1 or 2) | `GO_i` (1, 2, or 3) |\n",
    "| XGBoost objective | `binary:logistic` | `multi:softmax` (n_class=3) |\n",
    "| Primary metric | AUC-ROC (binary) | Macro-AUC + per-class metrics |\n",
    "| Risk flag | GO-2 = risk | GO-3 = risk (binary collapse) |\n",
    "| Scale pos weight | n_GO1/n_GO2 | `sample_weight` per class |\n",
    "| Threshold | Single (F1-optimal) | Per-class probability threshold |\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "### Two evaluation strategies\n",
    "\n",
    "**Strategy A — Multiclass (native K=3)**  \n",
    "Predict all three classes simultaneously. Metrics: macro-AUC, weighted F1,  \n",
    "confusion matrix 3×3, per-class precision/recall.\n",
    "\n",
    "**Strategy B — Binary collapse (GO-3 vs rest)**  \n",
    "Collapse GO-1 and GO-2 into \"not at risk\" and predict GO-3 as the positive class.  \n",
    "Allows direct comparison with M7 metrics and clinical threshold analysis.  \n",
    "Both strategies are run and compared in Section 10.\n"
   ]
  },
  {

    "import os\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")\n",
    "\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from scipy.stats import mannwhitneyu\n",
    "from statsmodels.stats.multitest import multipletests\n",
    "\n",
    "from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer\n",
    "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import (\n",
    "    roc_auc_score, f1_score, recall_score, precision_score,\n",
    "    brier_score_loss, roc_curve, confusion_matrix,\n",
    ")\n",
    "from xgboost import XGBClassifier\n",
    "import shap\n",
    "import joblib\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
    "\n",
    "import mlflow\n",
    "import mlflow.xgboost\n",
    "\n",
    "# ── Paths — adjust to your environment ───────────────────────────────────\n",
    "DATA_MASTER  = \"/Volumes/workspace/default/kmc_data/kmc_dataset_procesado_completo.csv\"\n",
    "DATA_CLUSTER = \"/Volumes/workspace/default/kmc_data/clusters_GO_WASI_k3.csv\"\n",
    "EXP_NAME     = \"/Users/a.echeverrig@uniandes.edu.co/prediccion-ci-prematuros-madre-canguro/notebooks/SavingBrains_M7_TwoPhase\"\n",
    "\n",
    "mlflow.set_registry_uri(\"databricks\")\n",
    "mlflow.set_experiment(EXP_NAME)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"MLflow tracking URI:\", mlflow.get_tracking_uri())\n",
    "print(\"Experiment         :\", EXP_NAME)\n",
    "print(\"xgboost:\", __import__('xgboost').__version__)\n",
    "print(\"numpy:\", np.__version__)\n",
    "print(\"pandas:\", pd.__version__)\n"
   ]
